message:
🐛 Fix demoData test assertions (kubevela, volcano, wasmcloud) — coverage RED fix

kubevela_status.test.ts:
- Fix KubeVelaAppStatus valid values (camelCase: workflowFailed not workflow-failed)
- Replace non-existent app.components array check with componentCount/traitCount
- Fix WorkflowStepPhase: 'suspending' not 'stopped'
- Fix pod field: pod.status (string) not pod.ready (boolean)
- Fix summary.controllerVersion → stats.controllerVersion

volcano_status.test.ts:
- Fix summary.schedulerVersion → stats.schedulerVersion
- Fix summary.totalScheduledJobs → stats.totalJobs

wasmcloud_status.test.ts:
- Fix host.id → host.hostId
- Fix actor.id → actor.actorId
- Fix actor.instances → actor.instanceCount
- Fix stats fields: totalHosts→hostCount, readyHosts removed,
  totalActors→actorCount, totalProviders→providerCount, totalLinks→linkCount
- Fix summary.latticeVersion → stats.latticeVersion

Fixes #10957

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
